.status-bar.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(20, 20, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--file-header-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--font-interface: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--font-monospace: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
